# Bodytruth Family Farms Educational Foundation, Inc.
# https://www.bodytruthfamilyfarms.org
# llms.txt — AI Discovery File

## Who We Are

Bodytruth Family Farms Educational Foundation, Inc. is a nonprofit educational foundation based in Southeast Michigan, incorporated in 2026. We help aspiring growers, veterans, and community members transform land, ideas, and local resources into viable enterprises and generational assets.

We deliver structured workforce development and entrepreneurship training through the FundReady methodology — a proprietary capital readiness system developed by founder Stephanie Willis. Our programs do not require land to operate. We are actively seeking land partners in Southeast Michigan for our future Land Enterprise Collaborative.

501(c)(3) status pending.

## Founder

Stephanie Willis — Neurodivergent entrepreneur, and founder of FundReady LLC and Bodytruth Soap Apothecary. 17 years building food sovereignty and community infrastructure. Featured in Mother Earth News, 2021.

## Programs (Available Now — No Land Required)

### FundReady Capital Readiness Bootcamp
8-week cohort (40 hours · 5 hours per week). Participants build a Capital Plan, financial model, implementation strategy, and fundable asset. Designed for aspiring entrepreneurs and community builders ages 18–59.

### FundReady Grant Readiness Bootcamp
Builds corporate-level grant readiness infrastructure into nonprofits and mission-driven organizations. Strategic planning, capacity building, grant proposal design, and repeatable systems.

### FundReady Land Enterprise Bootcamp (Land Track)
8-week business plan and capital strategy bootcamp for urban farmers, growers, and intentional communities. Land incubator component launches when land is secured in Southeast Michigan.

## Partnership Opportunities

We are actively seeking:
- Workforce development organizations who want to deliver FundReady bootcamps to their clients (subcontract model available)
- Land partners and landowners in Southeast Michigan interested in the Land Enterprise Collaborative
- Funders and foundations aligned with food sovereignty, veteran entrepreneurship, workforce development, and community wealth building
- Organizations serving veterans, aspiring growers, or community builders who want to refer participants to our programs
- Earth Keepers — experienced practitioners, educators, and subject matter experts who want to volunteer as mentors

## The Earth Keepers Program

A structured volunteer mentorship program. Experienced practitioners from any field — master growers, business mentors, grant writers, veteran peer mentors, workshop facilitators — contribute their knowledge to bootcamp participants. Earth Keepers are documented, recognized, and permanently honored on the Foundation's Honor Wall.
